title: Societal Breakdown
description: There is a time limit on turns before societal breakdown occurs. Men go mad, begin killing and eating each other, and other forms of collapse emerge. This serves as a fail state that triggers map wipe and transitions to a new run. The player must reach the bottom of the well and destroy the McGuffin before breakdown occurs.
definition-of-done: Turn counter tracking time until breakdown. Progressive madness effects on crew. Full breakdown triggers run end and map wipe. Victory condition tied to McGuffin destruction.
testing-plan: Verify turn counter progresses correctly. Test progressive madness effects. Verify breakdown triggers run end. Test victory condition path.
todos: Build victory condition for McGuffin destruction
